creator: kientzle@FreeBSD.org
text:
Supporting LZMA as an option is relatively simple.

Preferring or requiring LZMA would require that
LZMA support be available in the base system.

Supporting LZMA in the base systems requires that:
   1) A complete, stable BSD-licensed LZMA library be
incorporated into the base system.
   2) libarchive would need to be updated to support
LZMA via the library above.
   3) bsdtar would add lzma switches.

The first step above is difficult.  Once that's
accomplished, the remainder of this list is
pretty straightforward.

Tim Kientzle
